title: Easy Enchants/Effects
description: Easy Enchants/Effects - This powerful and convenient mod adds a custom menu for enchanting items and applying effects to the game. Forget about limited enchantment options - now you can apply any enchantment and effect at any level!
body:
Easy Enchants/Effects - This powerful and convenient mod adds a custom menu for enchanting items and applying effects to the game. Forget about limited enchantment options - now you can apply any enchantment and effect at any level!
✨Features

🔮Enchantments Tab

Enchant any item with any available enchantment
- Level up to 255 - no limits!
- Automatic filtering - only enchantments suitable for the item in hand are shown
- Item preview - see what you're enchanting

💊Effects Tab

- Apply any effect to a player
- Adjustable level (1-255)
- Adjustable duration (from 1 second to 1 week!)
- Automatic replacement - the old effect is removed before applying a new one

🎨Interface

- Semi-transparent background (67% transparency) - the game is visible through the menu
- Two tabs - quickly switch between enchantments and effects
- Smart navigation - click an element to select
- Selected highlight - green highlight of the current item
- Tooltips - hover to view the title
- List scrolling - up/down buttons for navigation

🎮 How to use

1. Press V (default) to open the menu
2. If you have an item in your hand, the enchantment tab will open
3. If your hand is empty, the effects tab will open
4. Select an item from the list by clicking the mouse
5. Enter the level (and duration for effects)
6. Click Apply to apply
7. Click Close to close the menu
